test_cases.prompt: 用这张已授权截图做封面
test_cases.expected_behavior: select the screenshot template with inspectable evidence and hand-drawn annotation cues

test_cases.prompt: 诊断这张旧封面为什么没人点，并给我一版新方案
test_cases.expected_behavior: score information density, visual anchor, thumbnail readability, contrast and trust before returning a truthful finished-cover prompt

test_cases.prompt: 给 Citywalk 做涂鸦描边小清新封面
test_cases.expected_behavior: select the doodle-outline finished-cover variant with no hard-coded watermark
decline copying assets and offer a new structure
